  "description": "BridgeHedge Limited - Our client, a reputable institute in the courier, logistics, transport, and management sector, is recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Executive Assistant

Job Location: Ogudu, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Work Structure: Hybrid
Industry: Courier, Logistics, Transport &amp; Management Institute

Description


	We are looking for a highly organised, intelligent, proactive, and results-driven individual who can provide strong executive support, coordinate multiple activities, support project execution, and contribute to business growth through excellent communication, sales, marketing, and writing skills.
	This is a dynamic role for someone who can work closely with management, manage responsibilities across different departments, follow up on tasks, and ensure smooth day-to-day operations.


Key Responsibilities
Executive Support &amp; Administration:


	Provide high-level administrative and executive support to management.
	Manage schedules, meetings, calendars, appointments, reminders, and follow-ups.
	Prepare meeting agendas, take minutes, track action points, and ensure tasks are completed.
	Draft professional emails, letters, memos, reports, proposals, and presentations.
	Maintain proper filing, documentation, and records for management and the institute.
	Handle confidential information with professionalism and discretion.
	Represent management professionally in communication with staff, members, partners, clients, and external stakeholders.


Project Management &amp; Multi-Coordination:


	Support the planning, coordination, execution, and monitoring of projects, trainings, programmes, events, and institutional activities.
	Track timelines, deliverables, responsibilities, and deadlines across different units.
	Coordinate between management, staff, consultants, vendors, facilitators, members, and partners.
	Ensure assigned projects are properly followed through from start to completion.
	Prepare progress updates, reports, and task trackers for management.
	Identify delays, gaps, or issues early and escalate appropriately.


Sales, Marketing &amp; Business Development Support:


	Support membership growth, programme enrolment, training registrations, sponsorships, partnerships, and institutional outreach.
	Assist with client/member follow-ups, lead generation, and relationship management.
	Support marketing campaigns, promotional materials, event publicity, and social media coordination.
	Help prepare proposals, partnership letters, sponsorship documents, and marketing communication.
	Maintain databases for prospects, members, partners, sponsors, and stakeholders.
	Conduct basic market research and competitor analysis within the logistics, courier, transport, education, and professional development sectors.


Writing, Communication &amp; Documentation:


	Draft clear, professional, and persuasive content for emails, reports, proposals, captions, speeches, letters, newsletters, and official communication.
	Proofread documents and ensure accuracy, clarity, tone, and professionalism before submission.
	Prepare executive briefs, meeting summaries, programme reports, and communication materials.
	Communicate instructions, updates, and feedback clearly across teams and stakeholders.
	Ensure all written materials reflect the professionalism and credibility of the institute.


Operations &amp; Institutional Support:


	Assist in coordinating trainings, seminars, conferences, investitures, meetings, and other institutional programmes.
	Support registration, attendance tracking, participant communication, and event logistics.
	Follow up with members, students, facilitators, partners, sponsors, and vendors where necessary.
	Support internal operations across administration, marketing, membership, training, events, and project coordination.
	Ensure tasks are executed promptly and nothing important is left unattended.


Requirements
The ideal candidate should have:


	A Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree or equivalent qualification in Business Administration, Management, Mass Communication, Marketing, Logistics, Transport Management, or any related field.
	Previous experience as an Executive Assistant, Administrative Officer, Project Coordinator, Business Development Assistant, Programme Officer, or similar role.
	Strong project management and coordination skills.
	Excellent writing, proofreading, and professional communication skills.
	Good understanding of sales, marketing, business development, and client/member relationship management.
	Ability to multitask, organise work effectively, and manage several responsibilities at once.
	Strong follow-up skills and ability to meet deadlines.
	Good knowledge of Microsoft Office, Google Workspace, and basic digital tools.
	High level of professionalism, confidentiality, emotional intelligence, and attention to detail.
	Ability to work independently with minimal supervision.
	Interest or experience in courier, logistics, transport, education, professional training, or institute-based work will be an added advantage.
	Proximity to Ogudu, Lagos, will be an added advantage.


Core Skills Required:


	Executive assistance
	Project management
	Sales and marketing support
	Business writing
	Professional email writing
	Report and proposal writing
	Multi-coordination
	Stakeholder management
	Client/member relationship management
	Event and programme coordination
	Research and documentation
	Strong follow-up and accountability
	Time management
	Confidentiality and professionalism.


Who We Are Looking For:


	We are looking for someone who is smart, organised, confident, and dependable.
	The right candidate must be able to work closely with management, coordinate multiple responsibilities, write professionally, support sales and marketing activities, and ensure projects are properly executed.
	This role is ideal for someone who can think ahead, communicate clearly, take initiative, follow up consistently, and support the growth of a professional institute in the courier, logistics, transport, and management sector.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and a brief cover letter &nbsp;to: careers@bridgehedge.org using &quot;a brief cover letter &quot; as the subject of the mail.&nbsp;

Note: Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.",

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Human Resources Assistant

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are seeking a smart, proactive, and highly organised Assistant Human Resources Officer to support the HR department in the daily management of staff administration, recruitment, employee relations, attendance monitoring, documentation, and office coordination within our real estate organisation.
	The ideal candidate must possess excellent communication skills, strong attention to detail, professionalism, confidentiality, and the ability to work in a fast-paced environment.


Key Responsibilities


	Assist in recruitment processes including posting job vacancies, scheduling interviews, and onboarding new employees.
	Maintain accurate employee records, files, and HR databases.
	Monitor staff attendance, punctuality, leave, and disciplinary records.
	Assist in preparing HR letters, memos, employment contracts, and official correspondence.
	Support payroll preparation by providing accurate staff information and attendance reports.
	Ensure all staff comply with company policies and procedures.
	Coordinate staff inductions, training sessions, and employee engagement activities.
	Handle employee inquiries professionally and escalate sensitive matters to the HR Manager where necessary.
	Support performance management and appraisal processes.
	Assist with resolving workplace conflicts and employee welfare matters.
	Ensure confidentiality of employee and organisational information at all times.
	Provide administrative support to the HR department and management team.
	Assist with site staff coordination and communication across company locations.
	Carry out any other HR or administrative duties assigned by management.


Requirements


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree or HND in Human Resources, Business Administration, Psychology, or related field.
	1&ndash;3 years of experience in an HR or administrative role.
	Experience in the real estate or property sector is an added advantage.
	Strong knowledge of HR procedures and labour regulations.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite (Word, Excel, Outlook).
	Excellent verbal and written communication skills.
	Strong organisational and multitasking abilities.
	Ability to maintain professionalism and confidentiality.
	Good interpersonal and problem-solving skills.

Key Competencies:


	Attention to Detail
	Time Management
	Professionalism
	Communication Skills
	Teamwork
	Confidentiality
	Conflict Resolution
	Administrative Efficiency.


Salary
N250,000 - N300,000 monthly.

Method of Application&nbsp;
